title: Builder Traits Snapshot
promise: A five-axis personality snapshot for venture builders, using public-domain IPIP items. Three minutes, no scores to maximize — only positions with a cost and a use.
description: 20 IPIP Likert items across five dimensions (Openness, Conscientiousness, Agreeableness, Emotional Stability, Achievement). Reverse-scored items prevent acquiescence bias. Result shows positions on five bipolar axes, not numeric scores.
ogDescription: Five-axis personality snapshot for venture builders. 20 IPIP items, ~3 min. Private by design.
